title: Auto-Sorter
description: Automatically sorts your inventory when you pick up an item.
body:
## 🧺 Auto Sorter

Auto Sorter automatically organizes your inventory the moment you pick up items — no keybinds, no menus, no effort.

As soon as an item enters your inventory, Auto Sorter intelligently rearranges everything to keep items grouped, tidy, and easy to find. Perfect for builders, miners, and anyone who hates inventory clutter.

In addition to automatic sorting, Auto Sorter also provides a **button** in the inventory screen, allowing you to manually organize your inventory whenever you want.

### ✨ Features
- 🔄 **Automatic sorting on item pickup**
- 🖱 **Manual sort button in the inventory**
- 📦 Groups similar items together
- ⚡ Works instantly in the background
- 🧠 No buttons or commands required for auto-sorting
- 🧹 Keeps your inventory clean at all times

### 🖼 How it organizes your inventory
![InventoryExample](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5873d6c2ec8fd62981a7b2a82280a038af9e7565.png)
*This Is An Example of a user from Reddit. We Used his structure to make this mod. Credits to u/ReagansRougeBanana*

### 🎯 Why use Auto Sorter?
- Saves time while mining or looting  
- Reduces inventory chaos  
- Lets you focus on gameplay instead of management  

Lightweight, simple, and always active — **Auto Sorter just works.**
